c.d: The number of active users on the platform, indicating its popularity and reach.
c.s: App Store, Google Play Store, Company Reports

c.d: The ability to customize messages with placeholders for recipient-specific information.
The maximum number of recipients that can be included in a single broadcast or group message.
The range of operating systems and devices the app supports (e.g., iOS, Android, Web).
The pricing structure of the app, including free tiers and subscription options.
The presence of end-to-end encryption and other security measures to protect user data.
The ability to integrate with other tools and platforms, such as CRM systems or email services.
The feature that allows users to schedule messages to be sent at a later time.
The ability to send images, videos, and other media types in messages.
Feedback from users regarding their experience with the app, indicating satisfaction and reliability.
c.s: App Store, Google Play Store, Review Aggregators
